title: AutoPlayer
description: This project adds an algorithm that can show you the (probably) best path from where you are to another place.
body:
# Autoplayer
## Features
- Currently Limited
- Allows you to start generating a path from where you are to another place in real time.
- Gives you even more power if you have the mod on the server aswell and are moderator.
## Caution!
- Currently unstable at large distances
## Contact details
- Github - [Autoplayer](https://github.com/123mjb/AutoPlayer)
- Discord - @123mjb
